business.name: Charlotte Electrical Service
business.tagline: Licensed Charlotte electricians who show up on time

hero.headline: Charlotte's *reliable* electrical team
hero.subheadline: When you call, we answer. When we say we'll be there, we show up.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every outlet, panel, and wire
services_section.subheading: From breaker installations to EV chargers — handled right the first time

services.title: Panel Upgrades & Breakers
services.description: New circuits, breaker installations, and full panel upgrades for modern electrical loads.

services.title: EV Charger Installation
services.description: Home charging stations installed fast with proper permits and safe wiring.

services.title: Lighting & Fixture Work
services.description: Pendant lights, ceiling fans, switches — moved, installed, or removed.

services.title: Electrical Troubleshooting
services.description: Find the problem, fix it right. No guesswork, no callbacks.

about.heading: Charlotte electricians who show up
about.body: We're the Charlotte electrical team that answers the phone and keeps appointments. Real techs, fair pricing, clean work.

reviews.name: Daniel S.
reviews.text: Jacob was on time, professional, and anticipated problems so there was no surprise work. Definitely on top of my list for future electrical needs.

reviews.name: H R.
reviews.text: Jesse had my car charger installed quickly and left the area cleaner than before. My electrician nephew said pricing was extremely fair and components were all quality.

reviews.name: Brittany T.
reviews.text: Daniel moved a pendant light and removed a ceiling fan fast. Very personable and even helped me with design decisions. Will ask for him personally next time.

cta.heading: Ready to get started?
cta.body: Call for your free quote or to schedule service. Real people answer the phone.
